test.query: SELECT sum(toUInt32({func}(t, 7))) FROM (SELECT toDateTime(1600000000 + number % 50000000, 'UTC') AS t FROM numbers(100000000))
SELECT sum(toUInt32({func}(t, 7))) FROM (SELECT toDateTime64(1600000000.123 + number % 50000000, 3, 'UTC') AS t FROM numbers(50000000))
SELECT sum(toUInt32({func}(t, 7))) FROM (SELECT toDateTime(1600000000 + number % 50000000, 'Europe/Berlin') AS t FROM numbers(50000000))
